For the contract demand of 3,400 kVA, 11 * Replacing 17,500 conventional tubelights * Replacing conventional Light fittings in SACOG: UENO 1 Oana, Eat 10
kV electrical supply has been arranged from with 1/5 tubelights to reduce electricity the campus with Motal Helide fittings to hrs, for the remaining time period only
Torrent Power A.B. Co. Ltd., Ahmedabad. consumption by 44%, reduce consumption by 40%. 1 lift to be operative.
The following energy conservation measures ¢ Application of Sustained Red Green & ° Replacement of conventional Cooling ° Replacement of 130 window type AC
were adopted with an additional investment Blue Light (SRGB) fittings by replacing Tower by FRP Cooling Tower (1,500 TR) machines by new ones to increase
of f 13.8 million* in stages. These resulted 1,000 watts Halogen fittings in Assembly to reduce consumption by 210 HP. efficiency.
in total savings of 6.103 million kWh from Hall to reduce electricity consumption by + Staggering the timings of the lifts - * Staggering the timings of AC Plants.
